name: FireEye Inc. Registered Shares
summary: FireEye, Inc., now part of Trellix, is a cybersecurity company that provides products and services to protect organizations from cyberattacks. The company's offerings include threat intelligence, security consulting, and incident response services. FireEye was headquartered in Milpitas, California, before being acquired by Symphony Technology Group and merged with McAfee to form Trellix.
